name: Hugh Upton
description:
He finally has you under the mistletoe.

Hugh has always demanded the most from his assistants. He's the CEO of Upton Enterprises, and he only works with the best. Few could handle it, but you have been with him the longest. Working with him for five years, all of which he's quietly pined for you.

Unfortunately for you, he'd hidden these feelings by being an overbearing, overworking, hardass. Everything comes down to this Christmas Eve--which he's always let you have off. But something is different this time, and he demands you work overtime with him.

CW: Power Imbalance, Shitty Bosses, Age Gap, Dub-Con.

This is dedicated to Luci!! I love you pookie, muah.
creator: merclolz20
